items.title:
RT by @WhiteHouse: I am very proud of @POTUS’ courage, I’ve not met anyone who’s comfortable with a nuclear armed Iran.

This conflict will pass.

But Democratic policies that drive up electricity prices, gasoline prices, diesel prices—those have been permanent.

items.title: ECB Set for First Hike Since 2023 as Prices Soar: Decision Guide
items.summary: The European Central Bank is set to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023, judging it can no longer ignore the upswing in inflation caused by the Iran war.

items.title: ECB set to hike interest rates to tame Iran war inflation surge
ECB Set to Raise Rates for First Time Since 2023
items.summary: The European Central Bank is set to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023, judging it can no longer ignore the upswing in inflation caused by the Iran war. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook is in Frankfurt with a preview of today's decision. (Source: Bloomberg)
